raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX activated my XXXX XXXX Credit Card by telephone. Used the card for XXXX and XXXX XXXX order. On XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX agent called me to tell me there were many suspicious activity on my card. I told agent to cancel the card and I told them that I didnt make a purchase to XXXX XXXX, Waldgreens all in Florida XXXX 
XXXX told me also someone tried to change my password on my account. XXXX told me to fax a letter to them with my ID. I went to A store to fax my photo ID. After the receive that fax they needed me to file a police report. Filed a police report on XX/XX/XXXX. I went to my local police dept and filed a report. I faxed the case number to XXXX XXXX. Every time I spoke to a different agent. Had to spend hours repeating my story. On XX/XX/XXXX filed a report to the FTC. 
Faxed a second time with police claim number to XXXX XXXX XXXX. 
Friday received a email stating they dont believe the other purchases were fraudulent.
